ddls:
CREATE TABLE "territorial_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territorial authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the territorial authority */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the authority is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the territorial authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the authority */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group (e.g., 12+, 5-11) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territorial authority */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the age group in the territorial authority */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of partially vaccinated individuals */,
  "completed_primary_course" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have completed the primary vaccination course */,
  "eligible_booster_1" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for booster shot 1 */,
  "booster_1_received" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have received booster shot 1 */,
  "eligible_booster_2" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for booster shot 2 */,
  "booster_2_received" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have received booster shot 2 */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES territorial_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination rate */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "partially_vaccinated_rate" REAL /* Partially vaccinated rate */,
  "completed_primary_course_rate" REAL /* Completed primary course rate */,
  "booster_1_rate" REAL /* Booster shot 1 rate */,
  "booster_2_rate" REAL /* Booster shot 2 rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rate calculation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser/device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., vaccination rates, access logs) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territorial_authority_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territorial authority */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the territorial authority */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the territorial authority */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "total_vaccination_centers" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccination centers in the authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territorial_authority_metadata_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES territorial_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_metadata_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data point */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of partially vaccinated individuals */,
  "completed_primary_course" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have completed the primary vaccination course */,
  "eligible_booster_1" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for booster shot 1 */,
  "booster_1_received" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have received booster shot 1 */,
  "eligible_booster_2" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for booster shot 2 */,
  "booster_2_received" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have received booster shot 2 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of data import (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "imported_from" TEXT /* Source from which the data was imported */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the data export */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data export (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "exported_to" TEXT /* Destination of the data export */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data point */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the data validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the data validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the data */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the validation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
